solutions.title: Border & Perimeter Surveillance
solutions.description: Sensor fusion with GIS for border monitoring — integrating UAV feeds, camera networks, and patrol tracking on a live map.

solutions.title: Incident Management System
solutions.description: Spatial incident logging, resource dispatch tracking, and after-action review tools for emergency response teams.

solutions.title: Electoral Boundary Mapping
solutions.description: Constituency demarcation, voter density analysis, polling station optimization and results visualization.

solutions.title: Water Network Management
solutions.description: Pipe network mapping, pressure zone analysis, and maintenance scheduling for water utilities across service areas.

solutions.title: Agricultural Field Monitoring
solutions.description: Crop health analysis using satellite imagery, NDVI indices, and seasonal change detection for farm advisories.

solutions.title: Land Parcel Management System
solutions.description: Interactive cadastral mapping with parcel search, ownership history, and zoning overlays.

solutions.title: Land Information Management System (LIMS)
solutions.description: Comprehensive LIMS for tracking land transactions, ownership transfers, encumbrances and legal disputes.

solutions.title: Urban Growth Analysis
solutions.description: Multi-temporal land use change detection and urban sprawl modelling for city and regional planners.

solutions.title: Forest Cover Change Monitor
solutions.description: Deforestation tracking using Sentinel-2 and Landsat imagery with automated alert systems.

solutions.title: Coastal & Wetland Monitoring
solutions.description: Shoreline change analysis, mangrove health mapping, and flood risk modelling for coastal communities.
